title: Why monday.COM sum LAST LINE does not work with formula column
excerpt: I set one of the columns as a function that calculates working hours for my employees in the office, giving it an entry time and an exit time  . But in the “last line in SUM” she sums up the hours as zero and doesn’t sum…

posts.author: aalaaidres (alaa idres)
posts.cookedHtml:
I set one of the columns as a function that calculates working hours for my employees in the office, giving it an entry time and an exit time . But in the “last line in SUM” she sums up the hours as zero and doesn’t sum them up .
Does the SUM line not work where the definition of the column is not numbers ?

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Yes they have to be numbers for the SUM to work on the group footer.

So T1 would need to be 0.5, 1.25, 1.25 respectively rather than 00:30, 01:15, 01:15.
